meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: What is driving the Houthis’ decision-making on joining the Iran war
items.summary: There are two currents within the Houthis: one favouring caution, and another favouring commitment to allies.

items.title: How Pakistan’s solar boom is shielding it from worst of Iran war crisis
items.summary: A quarter of Pakistani households are now using solar panels. This insulates millions of families from the energy crisis

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 39 of US-Israeli attacks?
items.summary: Trump has issued a strict deadline, but a defiant Iran says the threats by the US president are 'delusional'.

items.title: Israel threatens Iran’s trains, railways before Trump’s deadline expires
items.summary: The bridge connecting Saudi Arabia and Bahrain closed as Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure.

items.title: Australia charges ex-soldier Roberts-Smith with Afghan war crimes
items.summary: Charges come after Roberts-Smith lost case against reporters who said he was involved in murders of unarmed Afghan men.

items.title: Iran says US-Israeli projectile has struck a synagogue in Tehran
items.summary: A US-Israeli strike has caused extensive damage to a synagogue in Tehran, according to a video by Mehr News.

items.title: Trump’s threat to strike Iran’s power plants looms
items.summary: US President Donald Trump said ‘Tuesday will be power plant day’ in a vulgar post on social media.

items.title: ‘Why would Iran agree to a ceasefire given US and Israeli track record?’
items.summary: Political analyst Trita Parsi says no one should be surprised that Iran has rejected the idea of a US ceasefire deal.

items.title: Artemis II astronauts break record for farthest human travel from Earth
items.summary: Four astronauts from NASA’s Artemis II mission have broken the record for the farthest human travel from Earth.

items.title: ‘They want to create a rift’: Israeli attacks deepen Lebanon fissures
items.summary: Lebanon grows increasingly divided as escalating Israeli bombardment and ground invasion worsen displacement crisis.

items.title: Vance heads to Budapest to shore up Orban’s support before Sunday vote
items.summary: US vice president's Budapest trip highlights US-Hungary far-right alignment as Orban faces toughest electoral challenge.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump warns of attacks as Hormuz deal deadline nears
items.summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says US forces are carrying out more strikes on Iran than any day since start of war.

items.title: Trump says US could charge for Strait of Hormuz passage amid Iran war
items.summary: US president says Washington, as the 'winner' of the war, has a 'concept' for charging a toll in the strategic waterway.

items.title: Why is Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant being attacked?
items.summary: The WHO has warned of 'catastrophic' risks if radioactive release occurs.

items.title: Protesters swarm US embassy in Tel Aviv, demanding end of wars
items.summary: Protesters gathered outside the US embassy in Tel Aviv, calling for an end to the war with Iran and Lebanon.

items.title: Israeli soldiers fire tear gas at Palestinian youth during raid in Hebron
items.summary: Israeli forces raided the Muslim Youth Association in Hebron, firing tear gas at Palestinians.

items.title: Russia jails former Kursk governor in Ukraine incursion-linked graft probe
items.summary: Alexei Smirnov found guilty of taking bribes from firms contracted to build fortifications along Ukraine border.

items.title: Israeli air strike kills at least 10 Palestinians near Gaza school
items.summary: Drones are reported to have fired missiles into an area near Maghazi refugee camp.

items.title: US Supreme Court clears path for Steve Bannon criminal case dismissal
items.summary: Steve Bannon, an ally of US President Donald Trump, served a four-month prison sentence after his 2022 conviction.

items.title: Lebanon’s Hezbollah and Yemen’s Houthis join Iran in strike on Israel
items.summary: The Houthis in Yemen say they attacked Israel alongside their backers Iran and Hezbollah in Lebanon.

items.title: Trump claims Iranians begging US to keep bombing Iran
items.summary: Donald Trump claimed the US has “numerous intercepts” of Iranians pleading for a continuation of bombing.

items.title: Video: Trump threatens to jail reporter over Iran airman rescue leak
items.summary: Trump demanded the journalist who reported on the rescue of the US airman in Iran reveal their source.

items.title: Renewed Israeli strikes pound Lebanon as ground offensive deepens
items.summary: Israeli forces launched renewed strikes across Lebanon, hitting the south and Beirut’s outskirts, killing civilians.

items.title: Child rescued from rubble after Russia ramps up strikes on Ukraine
items.summary: A child was rescued from the rubble of a collapsed home in Odesa after a Russian strike killed at least three people.

items.title: Rescuers search for survivors after strikes hit homes in Iran
items.summary: Iranian Red Crescent footage shows damage in Iran, as rescuers search for survivors after US-Israeli strikes hit homes.
